more, whereas the right lung has three lobes, the left lung has only two. Though not visible on every model, each lung is surrounded by the pleura, which consists of two layers called the visceral and parietal pleurae. They are important because they lubricate the lungs and reduce friction during inhalation and exhalation. Vocabulary for Respiratory System can be found on page(s) 169. HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL 81
